member.name: T:GestationTracker.Models.Cats
member.summary: Base-class for each individual Cat

member.name: T:GestationTracker.Models.Pregnancy
member.summary: Base-class for each unique pregnancy that the Cats-class starts

member.name: P:GestationTracker.Models.Pregnancy.Trimester
member.summary: Shows the ongoing trimester in the pregnancy.

member.name: M:GestationTracker.Services.CatService.InitializeAsync
member.summary: Runs _isInitialized once in order to make the program run smoother. Reads Json-file and deserializes the list to more readable form.

member.name: M:GestationTracker.ViewModels.AddCatViewModel.LoadCatBreeds
member.summary: Loads the picker-element with JSON-list of cat breeds when the view is first opened.

member.name: M:GestationTracker.ViewModels.AddCatViewModel.OnCatIdChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.
